title: justicia lorata
intro: Justicia lorata, also known as the "Wild Basil" or "Justicia", is a tropical plant species native to the Americas, characterized by its distinctive blue flowers and fragrant foliage. The medicinal properties of Justicia lorata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Justicia lorata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Justicia lorata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
